findings.summary: High-fan-in utility and bootstrap hubs still need staged decomposition
evidence: These modules still sit on major fan-in paths and carry multiple concerns despite cleanup progress.
The remaining refactor work is mostly organizational and seam-hardening, not correctness blockers.
findings.suggestion: Plan a phased split with compatibility wrappers and ownership boundaries per domain (error handling, client bootstrap, utility grouping, type surface).
findings.reasoning: This is the main remaining abstraction debt after objective hygiene and review coverage improvements.
